originalTitle: Citi Maintains Buy Rating on AppLovin (APP)
summary: AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 22, 2026, Citi removed its “upside 90-day catalyst watch” on AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) while maintaining a Buy rating and $710 price target. Citi expects the company’s e-commerce clients to ramp more slowly following Axon’s general availability. Earlier […]
content:
AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In .On June 22, 2026, Citi removed its "upside 90-day catalyst watch" on AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) while maintaining a Buy rating and $710 price target. Citi expects the company's e-commerce clients to ramp more slowly following Axon's general availability.Earlier in June, Edgewater Research upgraded AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) to Outperform from Neutral.Last month, JPMorgan analyst Cory Carpenter raised the firm's price target on AppLovin to $515 from $500 and maintained a Neutral rating. Carpenter cited a Q1 beat and Q2 guidance that was in line with expectations. Piper Sandler also raised its price target on AppLovin to $665 from $650 and maintained an Overweight rating. Piper Sandler described the results as a "clean beat and raise," with Q1 revenue increasing 59% year-over-year and coming in 3.8% above Street estimates, the largest percentage beat since Q1 2025.

Earlier in May, AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) reported Q1 EPS of $3.56. Revenue totaled $1.84B, above the consensus estimate of $1.78B.AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) provides end-to-end artificial intelligence-powered advertising solutions for businesses in the United States and internationally.While we acknowledge the potential of APP as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the   best short-term AI stock . READ NEXT:  33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and Cathie Wood 2026 Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy .Disclosure: None. Follow Insider Monkey on Google News .
chineseTitle: 花旗维持 AppLovin (APP) 买入评级
chineseSummary: AppLovin Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：APP）是标准普尔 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之一。 2026 年 6 月 22 日，花旗取消了 AppLovin Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：APP）的“90 天上行催化剂观察”，同时维持买入评级和 710 美元的目标价。花旗预计，在 Axon 全面上市后，该公司的电子商务客户增长速度将放缓。早些时候[…]
chineseContent:
AppLovin Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：APP）是标普 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只股票之一。2026 年 6 月 22 日，花旗取消了对 AppLovin Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：APP）的“90 天上行催化剂观察”，同时维持买入评级和 710 美元的目标价。花旗预计，在 Axon 全面上市后，该公司的电子商务客户增长速度将更加缓慢。6 月初，Edgewater Research 将 AppLovin Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：APP）从“中性”上调至“跑赢大盘”。上个月，摩根大通分析师 Cory Carpenter 将 AppLovin 的目标股价从 500 美元上调至 515 美元，并维持“中性”评级。卡彭特指出，第一季度的业绩增长和第二季度的指引符合预期。 Piper Sandler 还将 AppLovin 的目标价从 650 美元上调至 665 美元，并维持增持评级。 Piper Sandler 将这一结果描述为“干净利落的增长”，第一季度收入同比增长 59%，比华尔街预期高出 3.8%，这是自 2025 年第一季度以来的最大百分比增长。

5 月初，AppLovin Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：APP）报告第一季度每股收益为 3.56 美元。收入总计 $1.84B，高于普遍预期的 $1.78B。AppLovin Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：APP）为美国和国际企业提供端到端人工智能驱动的广告解决方案。虽然我们承认 APP 作为投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票提供更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。阅读下一篇：3 年内应翻倍的 33 只股票和 Cathie Wood 2026 年投资组合：10 只最值得购买的股票。披露：无。在 Google 新闻上关注 Insider Monkey。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
